text: Final audit: testAllFull passed 450 JVM core, 447 Scala.js core, 30 JVM laws, 30 Scala.js laws, plus both full-optimized Scala.js test links. JVM and Scala.js API docs generated cleanly; benchmark targets compile. Short JMH GC receipt at 1024 entries: boxed COO.entries 37744.568 B/op; reusable primitive COO traversal 0.026 B/op and CSR traversal 0.082 B/op, with no observed collections (single short measurement).
